faqs.question: Is ITM Gwalior AICTE approved?
faqs.answer: Yes. ITM Gwalior is AICTE approved, NBA accredited, and holds NAAC 'A' Grade with CGPA 3.01 valid till November 24, 2030.

faqs.question: What is the NAAC grade of ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: ITM Gwalior has NAAC 'A' Grade with CGPA 3.01 and validity till November 24, 2030.

faqs.question: When was ITM Gwalior established?
faqs.answer: ITM Gwalior was established in 1997 and has 29+ years of academic experience.

faqs.question: What is the official website of ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: The official website is www.itmgoi.in. Use the online apply link at http://itmgoi.in/OnlineApply_ITMGOI.

faqs.question: What is the address of ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: ITM Campus, Opp. Sithouli Railway Station, NH-75 Sithouli, Jhansi Road, Gwalior - 475001, MP.

faqs.question: What courses are offered at ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: ITM Gwalior offers B.Tech CSE, B.Tech IT, B.Tech ECE, B.Tech ME, B.Tech Civil, BCA, BBA, B.Sc, B.Com, M.Tech, MBA, MCA, and M.Sc.

faqs.question: Does ITM Gwalior offer B.Tech CSE?
faqs.answer: Yes. B.Tech CSE is offered for 4 years with specializations like CS-AIML, CS-Data Science, CS-Cybersecurity, CS-IoT, and CS-Cloud.

faqs.question: Does ITM Gwalior offer B.Tech IT?
faqs.answer: Yes. B.Tech IT is offered for 4 years with specializations in Web Technologies, Mobile App Development, Network Security, and Database Management.

faqs.question: Does ITM Gwalior offer B.Tech ECE?
faqs.answer: Yes. B.Tech ECE is available with specializations in VLSI Design, Embedded Systems, and Signal Processing.

faqs.question: Does ITM Gwalior offer B.Tech Mechanical Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes. B.Tech Mechanical Engineering is available with specializations in Automobile Engineering, Thermal Engineering, Manufacturing, and CAD/CAM.

faqs.question: Does ITM Gwalior offer B.Tech Civil Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes. B.Tech Civil Engineering is available with specializations in Structural Engineering, Environmental Engineering, and Transportation Engineering.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech CSE?
faqs.answer: B.Tech CSE fee is Rs.87,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech IT?
faqs.answer: B.Tech IT fee is Rs.85,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech ECE?
faqs.answer: B.Tech ECE fee is Rs.84,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech Mechanical Engineering?
faqs.answer: B.Tech Mechanical Engineering fee is Rs.82,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech Civil Engineering?
faqs.answer: B.Tech Civil Engineering fee is Rs.80,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BCA?
faqs.answer: BCA fee is Rs.48,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BBA?
faqs.answer: BBA fee is Rs.42,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Com?
faqs.answer: B.Com fee is Rs.32,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Sc?
faqs.answer: B.Sc fee is Rs.36,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA?
faqs.answer: MBA fee is Rs.88,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MCA?
faqs.answer: MCA fee is Rs.58,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for M.Tech?
faqs.answer: M.Tech fee is Rs.92,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for M.Sc?
faqs.answer: M.Sc fee is Rs.46,000 per year.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Tech admission?
faqs.answer: For B.Tech, students need 60% in PCM in 12th and a valid JEE Mains score for DTE MP / RGPV counselling.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BCA admission?
faqs.answer: BCA requires 55% in 12th with Mathematics and can be taken through direct merit-based admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BBA admission?
faqs.answer: BBA requires 50% in 12th in any stream and is generally direct admission based on merit.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA?
faqs.answer: MBA requires graduation with at least 50% and entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, XAT, or MP-MAT.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MCA?
faqs.answer: MCA requires BCA or B.Sc (CS/IT) with 55% and Mathematics in the qualifying exam.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for M.Tech?
faqs.answer: M.Tech requires a relevant B.Tech or B.E. degree with 60% and preferably a GATE score.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: Apply online at www.itmgoi.in, pay the application fee, complete counselling or merit-based admission steps, and report to the campus with documents.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for 2026 admission?
faqs.answer: The last date to apply for 2026 admission is May 31, 2026.

faqs.question: What is the application fee?
faqs.answer: The application fee is Rs.500.

faqs.question: When do classes begin?
faqs.answer: Classes are expected to begin in August 2026.

faqs.question: What is the DTE MP counselling process?
faqs.answer: The process includes JEE Mains score, DTE MP registration, document verification, choice filling, seat allotment, and reporting to the institute.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission without JEE in BCA or BBA?
faqs.answer: Yes. BCA and BBA admissions are direct and merit-based, so JEE is not required.

faqs.question: What documents are required for admission?
faqs.answer: You need 10th and 12th marksheets, Aadhar card, photographs, migration certificate, character certificate, transfer certificate, and category or score documents if applicable.

faqs.question: What scholarships are available at ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: Available scholarships include Merit Scholarship, EWS Scholarship, SC/ST scholarship support, and Sports Scholarship.

faqs.question: What is the merit scholarship?
faqs.answer: Students with more than 90% marks can get a 50% fee waiver, subject to renewal rules.

faqs.question: What is the EWS scholarship?
faqs.answer: Students with family income below Rs.2.5 lakhs can get a 30% fee waiver, subject to renewal rules.

faqs.question: What is the SC/ST scholarship support?
faqs.answer: SC/ST students can receive government scholarship support plus a 25% institutional discount, as applicable.

faqs.question: What is the sports scholarship?
faqs.answer: State or national level athletes can receive a 20% fee waiver.

faqs.question: What is the hostel fee for boys?
faqs.answer: The boys hostel fee is Rs.68,000 per year, mess included.

faqs.question: What is the hostel fee for girls?
faqs.answer: The girls hostel fee is Rs.72,000 per year, mess included.

faqs.question: How many students can stay in the boys hostel?
faqs.answer: The boys hostel has a capacity of 500 students.

faqs.question: How many students can stay in the girls hostel?
faqs.answer: The girls hostel has a capacity of 300 students.

faqs.question: What facilities are available in the hostel?
faqs.answer: Hostel facilities include security, WiFi, hot water, common room, laundry, medical room, and mess.

faqs.question: What is the placement rate at ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: ITM Gwalior has a placement rate of 90%+.

faqs.question: What is the average package at ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: The average package is Rs.5.5 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the highest package at ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: The highest package is Rs.18 LPA.

faqs.question: Which companies recruit from ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, Accenture, IBM, Capgemini, Mphasis, FedEx, Xiaomi, ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, Bajaj FinServ, VISA, and Thermax Limited.

faqs.question: What is the TAP cell head contact?
faqs.answer: The TAP Cell head is Mr. Arpit Singh Chauhan. The contact number is +91-9691973919 and the email is arpit.chauhan@itmuniversity.ac.in.

faqs.question: What is the internship record of ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: ITM Gwalior has a record of 5 Lakh+ internships in 3 years and a World Book of Records recognition.

faqs.question: What is the EduSkills ranking of ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: ITM Gwalior was ranked #35 All India in 2024 for internships and related performance.

faqs.question: What facilities are available on campus?
faqs.answer: Campus facilities include a central library, computer labs, departmental labs, WiFi, auditorium, cafeteria, medical room, hostel, transport support, and sports facilities.

faqs.question: What is the library timing?
faqs.answer: The library is open Monday to Saturday from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM.

faqs.question: How to reach ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: The college is located opposite Sithouli Railway Station on NH-75, Jhansi Road, Gwalior - 475001.

faqs.question: What is the nearest railway station to ITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: The nearest railway station is Sithouli Railway Station, which is opposite the campus.

faqs.question: What are the college timings?
faqs.answer: College and office hours are Monday to Saturday from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Sunday is closed.

faqs.question: What clubs and activities are available?
faqs.answer: ITM Gwalior has PAC, IEEE Student Chapter, NSS, UBA Cell, Women Empowerment Cell, Sports Cell, Coding Club, AWS Cloud Club, and an active alumni network.

faqs.question: What is DiversITM?
faqs.answer: DiversITM is the annual cultural and technical fest of ITM Gwalior.

faqs.question: Does ITM Gwalior have scholarships for meritorious students?
faqs.answer: Yes. Students scoring more than 90% can get a 50% fee waiver under the merit scholarship.

faqs.question: What is the career scope of B.Tech CSE?
faqs.answer: B.Tech CSE can lead to software engineering, AI/ML, data science, cloud, and cybersecurity careers.

faqs.question: What is the career scope of B.Tech IT?
faqs.answer: B.Tech IT can lead to web development, app development, networking, and database careers.

faqs.question: What is the career scope of B.Tech ECE?
faqs.answer: B.Tech ECE can lead to electronics, embedded systems, telecom, and VLSI careers.

faqs.question: What is the career scope of B.Tech Mechanical?
faqs.answer: B.Tech Mechanical can lead to production, design, automobile, and manufacturing careers.

faqs.question: What is the career scope of B.Tech Civil?
faqs.answer: B.Tech Civil can lead to construction, infrastructure, site engineering, and public works careers.

faqs.question: What is the career scope of BCA?
faqs.answer: BCA can lead to software development, web development, and system analysis careers.

faqs.question: What is the career scope of BBA?
faqs.answer: BBA can lead to business, marketing, HR, and operations careers.

faqs.question: What is the career scope of MBA?
faqs.answer: MBA can lead to leadership, management, finance, marketing, HR, and operations roles.

faqs.question: What is the career scope of MCA?
faqs.answer: MCA can lead to advanced software, cloud, and data analytics careers.

faqs.question: What is the career scope of M.Tech?
faqs.answer: M.Tech can lead to research, teaching, senior engineering, and specialization roles.

faqs.question: What is the difference between B.Tech CSE and B.Tech IT?
faqs.answer: CSE focuses more on algorithms, programming, AI, and systems, while IT focuses more on software applications, web technologies, and IT systems.

faqs.question: What is the difference between BCA and B.Tech?
faqs.answer: BCA is a 3-year application-focused computer program, while B.Tech is a 4-year engineering degree with deeper technical and mathematical depth.

faqs.question: Can I get government jobs after engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes. After B.Tech you can prepare for GATE, PSU recruitment, SSC, state exams, and other government opportunities.
